---
title: "My first post"
description: |
  In this post, I introduced myself and then I will share a small tutorial on ggplot!
preview: Gaming.jpg
author:
  - name: Daniella Landrys
date: 2022-02-21
draft: true
categories: 
  - Français
  - Gaming
  - Statistics
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

Gaming, what does it really mean? In this blog i will share with you what does the gaming is. I will work on a datast named Gaming....
